title: Find Files by Extension with Python
summary: Recursively find files by one or more extensions, then return absolute paths plus total, matched, and skipped file counts.
highlights: Normalizes extension inputs such as txt to .txt
Supports case-insensitive matching for simple and compound suffixes
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Python 3.9 on macOS. Verified behavior includes extension normalization, case-insensitive matching, normalized absolute path output, deterministic traversal order, root symlink rejection, symlink path preservation, nested symlink directory skipping, and walk error propagation.
